MUSC - School of Music

MUSC400 Music Pedagogy (3 Credits)

Conference course. A study of major pedagogical treatises in music, and an evaluation of pedagogical techniques, materials, and procedures. Prerequisite: MUSP315; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC420 Introduction to Ethnomusicology (3 Credits)

Study of principal concepts and methods in ethnomusicology, covering history of field, linguistics and anthropology, music in various settings, musical cognition and ethnography of performance.
